The '''''Gilded Claw''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. By [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], it was assigned to defend [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]].

==History==
The ''Gilded Claw'' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] that was part of a the a security force that gaurded [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]].<ref name="CSWE" />

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Iron Fist (unabridged audiobook)}}
